infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses your camera to take photos and videos on your command.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses the microphone for voice input and commands.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nexus AI accesses your photo library to select and share images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Nexus AI saves photos and files to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses your location to answer 'where am I' and navigation requests.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Nexus AI uses your location to provide location-aware AI assistance.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Nexus AI accesses contacts to help you call, message, and email people by name.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Nexus AI accesses your calendar to schedule events and check your schedule.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Nexus AI creates reminders on your behalf when you ask.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses Face ID for secure authentication.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses speech recognition for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Nexus AI uses motion sensors for activity awareness.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Nexus AI may use Bluetooth for device communication.

plugins.photosPermission: Nexus AI accesses your photos to select images on your command.
plugins.cameraPermission: Nexus AI uses the camera to take photos and videos for you.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Nexus AI uses your location to answer location-based questions.
